{{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=2 |name=Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown 2025 |tickername=BMSD 2025 |shortname=2025 |caption='''"Beyond Limits"''' |image=Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown 2025 lightmode.png |imagedarkmode=Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown 2025 darkmode.png |icon=Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown 2025 lightmode.png |icondarkmode=Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown 2025 darkmode.png |type=Offline |team_number=48 |series=Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown|abbreviation=BMSD |organizer=KRAFTON |organizer-link=https://www.krafton.com/en/ |organizer2=Tesseract Esports |sponsor= |mode=squads|perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr|prizepool=1,00,00,000 |country=India |city=Hyderabad |venue=Tesseract Arena |sdate=2025-09-18 |edate=2025-10-12 |web=https://kraftonindiaesports.com/ |device=[https://www.apple.com/in/shop/buy-iphone/iphone-16 iPhone 16 Pro] |facebook=BattlegroundsMobileIN |discord=p2U2ebfHJC |youtube=@kraftonindiaesports |loco=BATTLEGROUNDS_MOBILE_INDIA |instagram=kraftonindiaesports |rulebook=https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Wi-qa9P0nUTvIEAZ2cx_I6Dcjcg_rdla/view?usp=drivesdk |previous=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Showdown/2022{{!}}2022 |next=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Showdown/2026{{!}}2026 }} '''Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown 2025''' or '''BMSD 2025''' is the second edition of ''Battlegrounds Mobile India Showdown''. The tournament is organized by '''[https://www.krafton.com/en/ KRAFTON]''' and features a total prize pool of ₹1,00,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Format=== * '''Lower Bracket:''''' September 18th - 21st, 2025 ** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|24 invited teams}}, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Double Round-robin format. ** Each team plays a total of 16 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} advance to ''Quarter Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|Bottom 12 teams}} are eliminated.
* '''Upper Bracket:''''' September 22nd - 25th, 2025 ** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|24 invited teams}}, 4 matchdays. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Double Round-robin format. ** Each team plays a total of 16 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} advance to ''Semi Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|stay|Remaining 12 teams}} advance to ''Quarter Finals''.
* '''Quarter Finals:''''' September 26th - 29th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 4 matchdays: *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Bottom 12 teams}} from Upper Bracket. *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Top 12 teams}} from Lower Bracket. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Double Round-robin format. ** Each team plays a total of 16 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} advance to ''Semi Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|Bottom 12 teams}} are eliminated.
* '''Semi Finals:''''' October 4th - 7th, 2025 ** 24 teams, 4 matchdays: *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Top 12 teams}} from Upper Bracket. *** {{Bgcolortext|stayup|Top 12 teams}} from Quarter Finals. ** Teams are divided into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** Double Round-robin format. ** Each team plays a total of 16 matches. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advance to ''Grand Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|stay|Bottom 16 teams}} advance to ''Survival Stage''.
* '''Survival Stage:''''' October 8th - 9th, 2025 ** 16 teams, 2 matchdays. ** 12 matches (6 each day). ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advance to ''Grand Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|down|Bottom 8 teams}} are eliminated.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' October 10th - 12th, 2025 ** 16 teams, 3 matchdays. ** 18 matches (6 each day).
